seo.title: Parametrika — Bespoke Collections | Dubai
seo.description: Bespoke parametric objects — tables, chairs, consoles and architectural panels — custom-made for UAE villas, hotels and signature spaces.

hero.eyebrow: UAE · The Art of Parametric Design
hero.sub: Parametric collections for interiors where exclusivity, architecture and impeccable execution are valued.

about.headline: Created for Spaces Without Compromise
about.body:
Parametrika is Dubai's only parametric furniture house.

Bespoke collections for private residences, five-star hotels and signature spaces. Furniture you cannot buy off the shelf — made to order, made for you.
about.stat1desc: Bespoke interior objects and architectural panels
about.nda: By client agreement, project photography is available on request.

catalog.headline: The Collection
catalog.sub: Every piece is created individually, reflecting the architecture of the space and the character of its owner.
catalog.metaDescription: Bespoke parametric collections: tables, chairs, consoles and architectural panels — CNC-milled and handmade in Dubai.

tables.name: For private interiors, hotels and executive spaces
tables.metaDescription: Bespoke parametric table collections — ZAHA, ZAHIR, VILAR, RAFAN, DUNE, RAYAN — CNC-milled from multi-layer engineered solid wood, handmade for UAE villas, hotels and executive spaces.

dining.label: Dining Group
dining.name: Dining Group
dining.body: Parametric dining table collections — ZAHA (8 seats), ZAHIR (6 seats) and VILAR (4 seats) — each with a signature sculptural base and premium tempered glass top. Standard configurations are set, yet every size and seating arrangement is made to client specification.
dining.tags: ZAHA · 8 seats · ZAHIR · 6 seats · VILAR · 4 seats

spec.topV: Premium tempered glass. Two shades: Neutral and Cappuccino
spec.sizeV: Any size and seating configuration to client specification

coffee.label: Coffee Tables
coffee.name: Coffee Tables
coffee.body: Parametric coffee table collections — RAFAN, DUNE and RAYAN. The sculptural base paired with a glass top creates a striking centrepiece for living rooms and lounge areas. Standard set of 4 pieces. Custom size to client specification.

spec.topV: Premium tempered glass. Two shades: Neutral and Cappuccino
spec.sizeV: Any size and configuration to client specification

office.label: Office
office.name: Office
office.body: Parametric office tables from the VILAR and ZAHA collections — for executive offices, boardrooms and home studies. Sculptural form, cable management on request. Custom size to client specification.

bar.label: Bar Collection
bar.name: Bar Collection
bar.body: The RAFAN bar collection — a parametric bar table paired with tall bar stools. Sculptural engineered-wood base, bar-counter height, custom configuration to client specification.

spec.sizeV: Any size and configuration to client specification

chairs.name: Collection SAHARA
chairs.metaDescription: SAHARA — the parametric rocking chair by Parametrika. Handmade from CNC-milled multi-layer engineered solid wood with orthopedic design and premium VITEC lacquer finish.

sahara.label: SAHARA
sahara.name: SAHARA Rocking Chair
sahara.body:
SAHARA rocking chair — the embodiment of flowing parametric geometry, where every line serves comfort and aesthetics. The sculptural form gently supports the body, creating a natural sense of relaxation and a gentle rocking motion.

Designed for reading, rest and quiet moments, the chair becomes not just a piece of furniture but a defining accent in the interior. Handmade assembly, flawless geometry and attention to every detail make SAHARA a work of art that sits equally at home in apartments, private villas, lounge areas and executive spaces.

consoles.name: Consoles
consoles.metaDescription: Bespoke parametric console tables, handmade from CNC-milled multi-layer engineered solid wood. Custom size and finish for UAE villas, hotels and signature entryways.
consoles.body: Console tables for entryways, hallways and living rooms. A long, slender silhouette on a sculptural layered base — handmade from multi-layer engineered solid wood. Wall-mounted or freestanding.

nightstands.name: Nightstands
nightstands.metaTitle: Parametric Nightstands — Bespoke Bedroom Furniture | Parametrika
nightstands.metaDescription: Bespoke parametric nightstands, handmade from CNC-milled multi-layer engineered solid wood. Custom finish and size for UAE villas and hotels.
nightstands.body: Parametric nightstands bring the same sculptural language to the bedroom. Handmade from multi-layer engineered solid wood — floating or floor-mounted, single or paired.

wood-panels.name: Wood Panels
wood-panels.metaTitle: Parametric Wood Wall Panels — Bespoke | Parametrika
wood-panels.metaDescription: CNC-milled parametric wood wall panels in custom patterns and finishes for UAE villas, hotels and signature interiors.
wood-panels.body: Parametric panels shape the architecture of a space, transforming walls into an expressive element of the interior. Individual design makes it possible to create any pattern, scale and geometry — from soft organic lines to complex sculptural compositions. Each solution is developed for a specific project, accentuating the character of the space and creating a unique visual rhythm.

process.headline: From Idea to a Work of Art
process.s1body: Every piece is born from a unique idea. The designer develops the parametric model in AutoCAD, accounting for the architecture of the space, individual dimensions and orthopedic principles.
process.s2body: The finished model is fed to high-precision CNC equipment. Every lamel is cut from engineered solid wood with flawless accuracy — line for line, curve for curve.
process.s3body: One master — one piece. Every element is shaped, sanded and assembled by a single craftsman from the first lamel to the final coat. Layer by layer, a sculptural volume takes form.
process.s4body: An internal system of concealed metal elements ensures exceptional strength and structural stability, preserving the aesthetic of the piece without any visible fixings.
process.s5body: Multi-step sanding and the application of premium VITEC lacquer (Turkey). The lacquer accentuates the natural grain of the wood without covering it — visible and tactile. Protection from moisture, UV and the UAE climate.
process.s6body: Every piece is wrapped in a bespoke cover, handmade to the exact contours of that specific piece. Our masters deliver and install in white gloves — precise placement, zero risk to the finish.
process.s7body: Care for every piece continues after installation. Personal service maintenance ensures the furniture remains in perfect condition for many years.

production.headline: Made by Hand, Built to Last
production.sub: CNC precision and human touch — every piece is assembled layer by layer in our atelier.

why.headline: Craftsmanship Without Compromise
why.w1body: Every piece is created for a specific client and a specific space. No off-the-shelf stock, no mass market — only bespoke furniture that cannot be owned by everyone.
why.w2body: Every item is made by a single craftsman — from the first lamel to the final coat. Not a production line. A collector-grade art object.
why.w3body: Solid engineered wood. Premium VITEC lacquer that accentuates the grain without covering it — visible in every piece. Green Certificate — no toxic substances, safe for the family.
why.w4body: Designed for both indoor and outdoor use, with every detail adapted to UAE heat, UV and humidity. Made here, for here.
why.w5body: Bespoke covers handmade to the exact contours of each piece, climate-controlled transport, installation by our masters in white gloves — service at the level of the product itself.

contact.headline: Request a Personal Proposal
contact.sub: Tell us about your project. We will prepare an individual solution that takes into account the architecture of your space and your wishes.
contact.address: Office 101, Al Zarouni Business Centre, Al Barsha, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai, UAE.
contact.name: Your Name
